# Outlook Power Tools

> Chrome extension for New Outlook (OWA): ad blocker, email templates, save email as PDF, quick steps, keyboard shortcuts, unread badge, and attachment reminder.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://outlookpowertools.com/): Features, pricing, download
- [Privacy Policy](https://outlookpowertools.com/privacy.html): Data handling
- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/outlook-power-tools/bdeggncnolenmmhnhadpdlggnkkjfmhn): Install

## Key Facts

- Works on: outlook.live.com, outlook.office.com, outlook.office365.com
- Version: 1.1.0
- Free: ad blocker, unread badge, attachment reminder, 15 built-in templates, 3 custom templates, 3 quick steps, 3 shortcuts, PDF via print dialog
- Pro: $3.99/month or $29.99/year — unlimited custom templates, quick steps, shortcuts, one-click PDF download
- Data: stored locally (chrome.storage), no email content collected
- Payment: Stripe (banana-clean.app checkout)
